en: There are five people in our family.

ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: Muskun aak Tama, Tina, masituqas-nanaz siin masituqas-nau’az katuskun aam.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: Inaak Tama malaungkav, Sasbinaz naak Tama ka.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: Innak Tina makuis, Ising naak Tina ka.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: Maaq Tama ihaan lumaq a malasBnun pabazbaz zami.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the Bunun language with us at home.

ab: Maqei pal’un aam a musuqais aam mun asang.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: Muskun aak inaak masituqas-nanaz masituqas-nau’az madamu auk’auk.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: Mazima aak inaak tastulumaq tu Bunun.
en: I like our family very much.
